message.content:
Rebuild two REAR projects with MSBuild (find MSBuild at C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\*\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe).

1. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\RH_JA02\RH_JA02(202).vbproj
   - Build with /p:Configuration=Release
   - Copy output exe to: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\exe\REAR RH_JA02(20260313).exe (overwrite existing)

2. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\LH_JA02\LH_JA02(212).vbproj
   - Build with /p:Configuration=Release
   - Copy output exe to: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\exe\REAR LH_JA02(20260313).exe (overwrite existing)

If build errors occur, fix them and retry. Report results.

완벽합니다! 두 프로젝트 모두 성공적으로 빌드되었습니다.

**빌드 결과**

두 REAR 프로젝트 모두 Release 구성으로 정상 빌드 완료.

- FrmWorkStandardSet.vb: 사용되지 않는 지역 변수 'tmp' (2개)
